item.title: 英伟达支持的英国人工智能公司Nscale完成20亿美元融资
item.description: 英伟达支持的英国人工智能公司Nscale周一宣布，已完成20亿美元融资，公司估值达146亿美元。【原文：Nvidia-backed ‌British ​artificial ​intelligence ⁠group ​Nscale ​has raised $2 ​billion ​at a ‌valuation ⁠of $14.6 ​billion, ​the ⁠company ​said ​on ⁠Monday.】

item.title: 伊朗战争持续发酵，华尔街期货暴跌，油价逼近120美元引发通胀担忧
item.description: 美国股指期货周一暴跌逾1%，而油价飙升，加剧了通胀担忧，因中东地区敌对行动未见缓和迹象。【原文：U.S. stock index futures tumbled ​more than 1% on Monday, while oil prices soared, exacerbating inflation fears as hostilities in the ‌Middle East showed no sign of abating.】

item.title: 《Expansion》称阿波罗本周将完成收购马德里竞技股份
item.description: 据西班牙《扩展报》周一援引消息人士报道，美国基金公司阿波罗旗下的体育投资部门阿波罗体育资本将于3月12日完成对西甲俱乐部马德里竞技55%股权的收购。【原文：U.S. fund Apollo's sports investment ​arm Apollo Sports ‌Capital will close the acquisition of 55% ​of Spanish football ​club Atletico Madrid on ⁠March 12, Spanish ​newspaper Expansion said ​on Monday citing sources.】

item.title: 从东京到悉尼，债券价格暴跌，油价突破115美元大关
item.description: 全球债券周一集体下跌，因美国与以色列对伊朗的战争迅速恶化，推动油价飙升至每桶115美元以上，加剧了投资者对通胀风险的担忧及其对利率前景的影响。【原文：Bonds across ​the globe sank on Monday as a rapidly worsening U.S.-Israeli war with Iran pushed oil prices well above $115 per ‌barrel, spurring investor fears over inflation risks and what it could mean for the interest rate outlook.】

item.title: 安捷伦以9.5亿美元全现金交易收购Biocare Medical
item.description: 安捷伦科技公司周一宣布，将以9.5亿美元全现金交易收购临床病理学公司Biocare Medical。【原文：Life ​sciences firm ‌Agilent Technologies ​said ​on Monday ⁠that ​it ​will acquire clinical ​pathology ​firm Biocare Medical ‌in ⁠an all-cash ​deal ​valued ⁠at $950 million.】

item.title: 激进股东威胁迫使日本企业解除交叉持股
item.description: 来自活动人士的压力，或对成为其攻击目标的担忧，正推动日本企业加速推进公司治理改革，逐步解除支撑企业关系数十年的交叉持股结构。【原文：Pressure from activists, or the fear of being targeted by them, is pushing Japanese ​companies to accelerate governance reforms by unwinding the cross-shareholdings that have underpinned relationships for decades.】

item.title: 伊朗冲突迫使各国央行急剧调整政策
item.description: 中东局势的持续恶化已使全球央行前景发生剧变，巨大的供给冲击迫使各国央行在支撑经济增长与抑制通胀之间面临艰难抉择。【原文：The escalating crisis in the Middle East has dramatically changed the outlook for global central banks, with the huge supply shock posing a ​difficult trade-off between underpinning growth and countering inflation.】

item.title: 早间提示：最好现在就去把油箱加满
item.description: 韦恩·科尔为您解析欧洲及全球市场今日展望。【原文：A look at the day ahead in European and global markets from Wayne Cole.】

item.title: 据彭博社报道，Live Nation即将达成和解，无需出售Ticketmaster业务
item.description: 据彭博社周一援引消息人士报道，Live Nation娱乐公司即将达成一项协议，以解决联邦反垄断诉讼，该协议将避免其旗下Ticketmaster部门被出售。【原文：Live Nation ​Entertainment is close to settling ‌a federal antitrust lawsuit in a deal that would avoid the sale of its ​Ticketmaster unit, Bloomberg News reported on ​Monday, citing sources.】

item.title: 油价飙升25%，金价下跌，伊朗战争冲击全球大宗商品市场
item.description: 布伦特原油正朝着其有史以来最大单日涨幅迈进，无论从百分比还是绝对值来看都是如此。随着美国与以色列对伊朗的战争不断扩大，一些主要中东产油国纷纷削减供应。【原文：Brent was on track for its biggest one-day gain ever in both percentage and absolute terms as the expanding U.S.-Israeli war with Iran led some major Middle Eastern oil producers to cut supplies.】

item.title: 消息人士称，美国与日本可能携手日本显示器公司，在投资方案框架下共同建设美国新工厂
item.description: 知情人士周一透露，东京与华盛顿正考虑与日本显示器公司合作在美国建设显示器工厂，此举是日本计划中5500亿美元投资方案的一部分。【原文：Tokyo and Washington are looking at building a display factory in the U.S. in partnership with Japan Display as ​part of Japan's planned $550 billion investment package, two sources with ‌knowledge of the matter said on Monday.】

item.title: 油价飙升、伊朗战争升级，航空股遭受重创
item.description: 油价飙升及美以与伊朗的冲突升级，周一重创亚洲航空股，给本就面临空域紧张的航空公司带来更大压力——旅客正争相避开中东冲突地区。【原文：Surging oil prices and the escalating U.S.-Israeli war with Iran hammered airline stocks in Asia on Monday, piling pressure on carriers already navigating ​tight airspace as travellers scramble to evade the Middle East conflict.】

item.title: 澳大利亚实施新网络年龄限制，VPN服务畅通无阻，色情网站却遭封锁
item.description: 数据显示，虚拟专用网络（VPN）位列澳大利亚下载量最高的智能手机应用程序之列。与此同时，全球最大的色情内容分发商之一表示，随着该国周一推出全面的网络年龄限制措施，其正封禁用户访问。【原文：Virtual private networks (VPNs) were among Australia's most downloaded smartphone applications, usage ​data showed, while one of the world's largest pornography distributors said it was blocking users ‌as the country rolled out sweeping online age-restrictions on Monday.】

item.title: 据《华尔街日报》报道，激进股东Starboard增持Lamb Weston股份，敦促其加快业务重组步伐。
item.description: 据《华尔街日报》周日援引消息人士报道，激进投资者Starboard Value已在兰博威斯顿公司建立可观股权，并敦促这家薯条制造商加快运营改进和成本削减步伐，以提振其股价。【原文：Activist investor Starboard Value has built a sizable stake in Lamb Weston and ​is urging the french-fry maker to speed ‌up operational improvements and cost cuts to help lift its stock price, the Wall Street Journal ​said on Sunday, citing sources.】

item.title: 油价飙升20%，伊朗战争加剧供应担忧
item.description: 周一早盘交易中，油价飙升约20%，触及2022年7月以来最高点。随着美国与以色列对伊朗的战争不断升级，市场担忧供应趋紧，霍尔木兹海峡的运输中断可能长期持续。【原文：Oil prices jumped about 20% in early trading on Monday, ​hitting their highest since July ‌2022, as the expanding U.S.-Israeli war with Iran fuelled fears of tighter supply ​and prolonged disruptions to ​shipments through the Strait of Hormuz.】

item.title: 美元飙升，美伊战争推动油价突破每桶100美元
item.description: 周一美元再度走高，兑欧元汇率跃升至三个月高点。随着油价突破每桶100美元大关、股市下跌，投资者纷纷寻求避险资产，因中东地区持续的战争威胁着全球能源供应链。【原文：The dollar took another leg higher on Monday, jumping to a three-month peak on the euro as oil surged past $100 a barrel, stocks slid and investors headed for safety as protracted war in the Middle ​East threatened to disrupt global energy supplies.】

item.title: 特朗普访华或难有突破，旨在维持稳定
item.description: 五位知情人士透露，本月美国总统特朗普与中国国家主席习近平的峰会，恐怕难以为商业和投资关系的有限重置创造空间。【原文：A summit between U.S. President Donald Trump and China's Xi Jinping this month is unlikely to create room for even a limited reset of business and investment ties, five people briefed on preparations said.】

item.title: 油价飙升，亚洲股市下跌，中东冲突持续升级
item.description: 亚洲股市期货周一大幅下挫，因油价飙升引发的通胀压力可能推高全球生活成本乃至利率水平，而投资者对流动性的渴求则持续支撑美元需求。【原文：Share futures ​fell sharply in Asia on Monday as the inflationary pulse from surging oil prices ‌threatened to raise living costs, and perhaps interest rates, across the globe, while an investor hunger for liquidity kept the U.S. dollar in demand.】

item.title: 美国油价因供应担忧跳涨，美以与伊朗的战争不断扩大
item.description: 美国原油期货周一早盘上涨逾20%，触及2022年7月以来最高水平。随着美国与以色列对伊朗的战争不断升级，市场担忧供应趋紧且霍尔木兹海峡的运输中断将持续。【原文：U.S. crude futures rose more than 20% in early trade on Monday, hitting ​their highest since July 2022, as the ‌expanding U.S.-Israeli war with Iran fuelled fears of tighter supply and prolonged disruptions to shipments through the Strait ​of Hormuz.】

item.title: 天空新闻报道称，X公司对xAI旗下Grok聊天机器人的冒犯性言论展开调查
item.description: 据天空新闻周日报道，社交媒体平台X正在调查xAI聊天机器人Grok发布的种族主义和冒犯性内容。【原文：Social ​media platform ‌X is ​investigating ​racist and ⁠offensive ​posts by ​xAI chatbot Grok, ​Sky ​News reported ‌on ⁠Sunday.】

item.title: 从1776年到2026年：亚当·斯密给全球经济的启示
item.description: 向富人征税。废除关税。终结垄断。这些现代口号仿佛出自那位备受尊崇的18世纪经济学家之手——其经济学经典著作《国富论》将于本周一迎来问世250周年纪念。【原文：Tax the rich. Trash the tariffs. End monopolies. These modern rallying calls could have come straight from the pen of the revered 18th-century economist, whose economics classic “The Wealth of Nations” celebrates its 250th anniversary on Monday.】

item.title: 据《金融时报》报道，KKR计划以数十亿美元出售数据中心制冷公司
item.description: 据《金融时报》周日援引知情人士报道，美国私募股权公司KKR正与顾问合作，计划以可能超过30亿美元的价格出售数据中心公司CoolIT Systems。【原文：U.S. private equity firm ​KKR is working with advisers on ‌a sale of data center company CoolIT Systems for a price tag potentially exceeding $3 billion, the Financial Times reported on ​Sunday, citing people familiar with the ​matter.】

item.title: 美国法官撤销卡里·莱克2025年担任美国之音首席执行官期间采取的行动，包括裁员决定
item.description: 联邦法官周六裁定，卡里·莱克去年大部分时间领导美国全球媒体署的行为违反联邦法律，其在美国之音部门实施的大规模裁员及终止多项业务的举措均被宣告无效。【原文：A federal judge ruled on Saturday that Kari Lake's leadership of the U.S. Agency for Global Media for much of last year violated federal ​law, invalidating a sweeping series of actions she took to cut staff and end many ‌operations at its Voice of America unit.】

item.title: OpenAI机器人部门负责人辞职，此前该公司与五角大楼达成合作协议
item.description: OpenAI机器人与消费硬件部门负责人凯特琳·卡利诺夫斯基于周六宣布辞职，称其对该公司与美国国防部达成的协议存在担忧。【原文：Caitlin Kalinowski, head of robotics and consumer hardware at OpenAI, announced her resignation on Saturday, citing ​concerns about the company's agreement with the Department ‌of Defense.】

item.title: 日经亚洲报道：美日将130亿美元日本显示器工厂纳入投资计划
item.description: 据《日经亚洲》周六报道，日本政府已就运营一家尖端工厂事宜与日本显示器公司接洽，该项目是日本政府对美5500亿美元投资与贷款计划的一部分。【原文：The Japanese ​government has approached ‌Japan Display about ​operating ​a cutting-edge factory ⁠in ​the U.S. ​as part of its $550 billion ​investment ​and loan package ‌in ⁠the country, Nikkei Asia reported ​on ​Saturday.】

item.title: 中国警告全球芯片短缺风险加剧，恩智浦纠纷再度升级
item.description: 北京方面警告称，恩智浦半导体与其中国子公司之间可能出现"新的冲突"。【原文：Beijing warned of "new conflicts" between Nexperia and its Chinese subsidiary.】

item.title: 伊朗战争恐将对全球能源市场造成长期冲击
item.description: 这种前景不仅构成更广泛的全球经济威胁，也使美国总统唐纳德·特朗普在中期选举前面临政治脆弱性。【原文：The outlook poses a wider global economic threat, as well as a political vulnerability for U.S. President Donald Trump leading into ​the midterm elections.】

item.title: 专家称中国或将在3-5年内实现脑机接口技术的广泛应用
item.description: 中国脑机接口（BCI）技术有望在三至五年内进入实际公共应用阶段，随着相关产品日趋成熟，一位顶尖BCI专家如是说。目前北京正全力追赶包括埃隆·马斯克旗下Neuralink在内的美国初创企业。【原文：China could see brain-computer interface (BCI) technology move into practical ​public use within three to five years as products mature, a leading BCI expert said, ‌as Beijing races to catch up with U.S. startups including Elon Musk's Neuralink.】

item.title: 罗氏董事长仍预计美国关税将对诊断业务造成冲击
item.description: 罗氏集团董事长塞韦林·施万周六表示，该公司预计与美国政府的协议将使其药品免于当前进口关税，但其诊断业务仍面临风险，在最初150天宽限期结束后可能面临新一轮关税。【原文：Roche expects its agreement with the U.S. government will keep its medicines exempt from the current round of ​import tariffs, but its diagnostics division remains exposed and ‌could face renewed duties after an initial 150-day period, Chairman Severin Schwan said on Saturday.】

item.title: 中国江苏大力推进人工智能产业发展，习近平敦促该省发挥引领作用
item.description: 中国东部经济大省江苏的政府官员周六强调了扩大人工智能基础设施建设、升级制造业的计划。此前，国家主席习近平敦促该省在推动技术驱动型增长方面发挥引领作用。【原文：Government officials from China's eastern economic powerhouse Jiangsu highlighted plans to expand artificial intelligence infrastructure and upgrade manufacturing on Saturday, after President Xi Jinping ​urged the province to take the lead in developing technology-driven growth.】
